ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of the study (e.g., preclinical, clinical) */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Unique name for the study */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal in the study */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal (e.g., Rat, Mouse) */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the animal (e.g., Sprague-Dawley) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the animal (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose administered to the animal */,
  "dose_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dose (e.g., ppm, mg/kg) */,
  "dose_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the dose administration (hours per day) */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., Dosed Feed, IV) */,
  "body_weight" REAL /* Body weight of the animal in grams */,
  "study_time" REAL /* Duration of the study */,
  "study_time_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the study time (e.g., week, day) */,
  "target_point" REAL /* Target point of the study (e.g., 0, 12) */,
  "target_point_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the target point (e.g., hour, day) */,
  "analyte" TEXT /* Analyte being measured (e.g., Wyeth-14643) */,
  "plasma_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the analyte in plasma (ug/mL) */,
  "plasma_concentration_specification" TEXT /* Specification of the plasma concentration (e.g., None, estimated concentration) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the study */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the study */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal (e.g., Rat, Mouse) */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the animal (e.g., Sprague-Dawley) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the animal (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the animal */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the animal (e.g., supplier, in-house) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the animal record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the animal record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "compound_code" TEXT /* Code of the compound */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the compound record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the compound record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Role ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Role ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Study ID */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
column_names: Type of the study (e.g., preclinical, clinical)
